name: Country Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bran flakes and boiling water in a bowl. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream together shortening and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in the bran flakes mixture and all-bran into the creamed mixture.
6. Gradually add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, just enough to moisten.
7. Spoon batter into greased 1 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
8. Bake at 400 degrees F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and jam.
NOTE:
Batter can be stored in the refrigerator for a few days. Bake as directed.
